items.claim: Mike Davis tends to bite on feints to set up counters, creating openings for his opponent to shoot for takedowns.
items.quote: Mike Davis is going to bite on those to counter and those are going to be the openings for a leave to take him to the ground.

items.claim: Shamrock is a significantly lesser fighter compared to Mike Davis.
items.quote: Shamrock is a much lesser fighter than Mike Davis.

items.claim: If Mike Davis gets backed up against the fence, he will get wrestled for the entire duration and lose the round.
items.quote: if he does, he's going to get wrestled the entire time. If his back is on the fence, he's going to lose the round.

items.claim: Alif excels significantly at chain wrestling and fence wrestling.
items.quote: Aliv is way too good at chain wrestling. He's so good at fence wrestling.

items.claim: Alif's stand-up striking is not very good on its own and is only effective when mixed with his wrestling.
items.quote: Alif's standup is not that great. It's only effective when he's mixing it with his wrestling.
